name: C-2 control mapping: update applies only to the matching (framework, control_id) entry leaving others untouched
command:
printf -- '- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC2.2
  legal_review_status: pending
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework soc2 --control-id CC1.1 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file controls.yaml 2>/dev/null && grep -c 'legal_review_status: pending' controls.yaml | grep -q '^1$' && grep -q 'legal_review_status: reviewed_by:counsel:2026-05-04' controls.yaml && echo isolated 1>&2
